mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO chat_sessions (session_id, title, message_count, created_at, last_active) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{title}, 0, #{now}, #{now})
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, title, message_count, created_at, last_active FROM chat_sessions ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (session_id, message_id, role, content, skill_name, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{skillName}, #{now})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, message_id, role, content, skill_name, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
